identity: Human male fighter, young adult, curly dark brown hair with wavy fringe, dark brown eyes, serious focused expression, athletic build.
outfit: Silver-steel plate armor with simple rounded pauldrons and a layered cuirass, brown leather gloves with metal plating, no cape, no tabard, no helm.
weapons: A steel longsword with a golden crossguard and round gold pommel held upright in the right hand. A gray steel heater shield with darker iron rim and plain face in the left hand.
attackStyle: East-facing. Mid-strike longsword slash forward at chest height with the right hand, shield raised protectively in left hand, right foot lunged forward.
spellStyle: East-facing. Longsword pointed skyward in right hand with a faint white aura along the blade, shield held at left side, battle-cry stance.
blockStyle: East-facing. Heater shield raised across the body as a guard, longsword lowered behind the shield, knees bent.
koStyle: East-facing, kneeling on the ground, longsword and shield dropped beside him, head bowed.
southStyle: Facing camera (south), calm combat idle. Longsword held upright in right hand, heater shield resting at left side.
portraitStyle: Bust shot from mid-chest up, three-quarter view. Curly dark brown hair, serious expression, silver plate armor, steel longsword with golden crossguard raised in the right hand, gray heater shield visible in the left.

referenceSheet.prompt:
IDENTITY (this image becomes the canonical identity anchor — preserve in every downstream frame): Human male fighter, young adult, curly dark brown hair with wavy fringe, dark brown eyes, serious focused expression, athletic build.

OUTFIT: Silver-steel plate armor with simple rounded pauldrons and a layered cuirass, brown leather gloves with metal plating, no cape, no tabard, no helm.

WEAPONS: A steel longsword with a golden crossguard and round gold pommel held upright in the right hand. A gray steel heater shield with darker iron rim and plain face in the left hand.

CLASS: humanoid. Full-body view, head to feet visible. Character occupies ~70% of the canvas height. Feet aligned near the bottom; headroom above.

POSE: full-body side profile facing right (east), calm combat-ready idle. Head up, eyes visible. NOT a portrait bust, NOT a close-up — entire character from head to feet.

STYLE: detailed pixel art with clean readable silhouette, warm pixel-art palette, transparent background, no ground shadow.

portrait.prompt:
IDENTITY (must match reference sheet exactly): Human male fighter, young adult, curly dark brown hair with wavy fringe, dark brown eyes, serious focused expression, athletic build.

OUTFIT: Silver-steel plate armor with simple rounded pauldrons and a layered cuirass, brown leather gloves with metal plating, no cape, no tabard, no helm.

WEAPONS: A steel longsword with a golden crossguard and round gold pommel held upright in the right hand. A gray steel heater shield with darker iron rim and plain face in the left hand.

POSE (portrait): Bust shot from mid-chest up, three-quarter view. Curly dark brown hair, serious expression, silver plate armor, steel longsword with golden crossguard raised in the right hand, gray heater shield visible in the left.

FRAMING: bust shot from mid-chest up, three-quarter view, centered in a 256x256 canvas, shoulders fill the lower third.

SCALE (non-negotiable): character must occupy approximately 180px of the 256px canvas height — roughly 70%. Do NOT stretch or upscale. Extra space above head and/or below feet is correct.

STYLE: pixel art, transparent background, no ground shadow, no borders, no text. Match the palette and style of the reference sheet.

NEGATIVE: do not add weapons or props not listed in WEAPONS. Do not change palette, species, or outfit from the reference sheet. Do not zoom in — respect SCALE.
